title: Utilize Async Iterators as Streams
description: Explain how Async Iterators (`for await...of`) can simplify stream consumption. Architect modern data pipelines using Async Iterators for efficient and readable stream processing. Convert traditional Node.js streams into Async Iterables for integration with native language constructs.
objectives: Explain how Async Iterators (`for await...of`) can simplify stream consumption.
Architect modern data pipelines using Async Iterators for efficient and readable stream processing.
Convert traditional Node.js streams into Async Iterables for integration with native language constructs.
